title: coreopsis oblanceolata
intro: Coreopsis oblanceolata, also known as the roadside coreopsis, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. It is primarily used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herb is often prepared in teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
